title: Our story
description: For nearly four decades, Bedrock has self-performed the work most firms subcontract.

hero.title:
Engineering discipline.
Absolute certainty.
hero.lede: For nearly four decades, Bedrock has self-performed the work most firms subcontract.

intro.title: Built on the belief that great construction requires great character
paragraphs: Founded in Chicago in 1987, Bedrock began as a regional commercial contractor. Today we operate in 27 countries, self-performing core trades to maintain quality and schedule certainty.
Our 6,500-person team includes chartered engineers, certified PMs, licensed safety professionals and specialist tradespeople who take personal pride in every structure we deliver.

cards.title: Mission
cards.text: To deliver complex projects that create lasting value for clients and communities — on budget, on schedule, without compromise.

cards.title: Vision
cards.text: To be the most trusted builder in every market — recognized for engineering excellence, safety leadership and sustainable practice.

cards.title: Values
cards.text: Safety first. Quality without compromise. Absolute integrity with clients, partners and communities.

leadership.title: Engineers who lead from the front

awards.title: Awards & certifications
awards.lede: Independently verified proof that our standards match our promises.
